site.title: Panen Baik - Fresh Produce Subscription
site.description: Premium fresh produce delivered to your door. Subscribe to weekly, monthly, or one-time deliveries of organic vegetables and fruits.

hero.label: Subscribe to Fresh Produce from Local Farms
hero.body: Curated organic vegetables from local farms delivered to your doorstep. Subscribe once, enjoy fresh produce on your schedule.

howItWorks.label: Simple & convenient
howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick from our curated selection of organic harvest boxes sized for your household.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Order once or subscribe for automatic deliveries — weekly, monthly, or your preference.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We deliver farm-fresh vegetables to your door. Cancel or pause anytime.

orderTypes.label: Flexible options
orderTypes.heading: One-time or subscription
orderTypes.oneTimeDesc: Try our harvest box without commitment. Perfect for first-time customers.
orderTypes.subscriptionDesc: Set it and forget it. Fresh produce delivered automatically on your preferred schedule.
orderTypes.subscriptionBenefit2: Never run out of fresh produce

paymentTrust.label: Secure & trustworthy
paymentTrust.heading: Payment you can trust
paymentTrust.note: All payments are processed securely through Xendit, Indonesia's leading payment platform. Your data is encrypted and protected.

products.selectAlertDesc: Click any product above to continue to checkout

checkout.paymentNote: You'll select your payment method on Xendit's secure payment page. No selection needed here.
checkout.validationDetails: Please complete all your details (name, valid email, and valid phone number)
checkout.validationAddress: Please complete your delivery address (street, city, and postal code)

paymentSuccess.heading: Order Confirmed!
paymentSuccess.body: Thank you for your order. Your fresh harvest is being prepared and will be on its way soon.
paymentSuccess.step1Desc: Your harvest box will be packed with the freshest produce
paymentSuccess.step2Desc: A confirmation email with order details has been sent

paymentFailed.heading: Payment Unsuccessful
paymentFailed.body: We weren't able to process your payment. Don't worry — no charges have been made. You can try again or contact us for help.
paymentFailed.step1Desc: Check your payment details and try a different payment method
paymentFailed.step2Desc: Reach out to hello@panenbaik.id for assistance
